## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `uv run pytest` (credential-free unit suite) passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest -m live` run locally (if the change touches live Notion behaviour) — paste result:

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run mypy src/` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CLAUDE.md / CONTRIBUTING) if behaviour changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
